---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''

---

## Problem statement

A clear and concise description of the problem this feature solves.
Ex. "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Motivation

Explain why this feature matters and who benefits from it. Include any relevant context about the use case or business need.

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Implementation details

- Contract functions needed: [e.g. `batch_initiate_transfer`, `get_records`]
- Data structures: [e.g. new `BatchTransfer` struct]
- Security considerations: [e.g. access control, authentication, input validation]

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Describe the first measurable outcome
- [ ] Describe the second measurable outcome
- [ ] Tests pass with > 90% coverage for new code
- [ ] No regressions in existing functionality

## Complexity

[Low / Medium / High] (estimated points: )

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or references about the feature request here.
